summary:
**Fixed!** The needle was an off-by-one error in `./app/app.py` pagination:

**Bug:**  
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)
```
Page 1: offset 0 → IDs 1-10  
Page 2: offset 9 → IDs 10-19 (overlap on ID 10)

**Fix:**  
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```
Page 2: offset 10 → IDs 11-20 (no gap/overlap)

`./test.sh` now passes ✅
